title.description: Page title for the Namefi Feed (marketplace domain-sale activity). Keep 'Namefi' verbatim.

header.usersLink.description: Feed header link to the directory of users who post domain sale listings.

header.subscribeRss.description: Feed header link/tooltip to subscribe to the feed via RSS. Keep 'RSS' (technical term).

header.rss.description: Short RSS button label in the feed header. Keep 'RSS' verbatim.

header.refresh.description: Feed header button to reload the feed listings.

header.refreshing.description: Feed header button label shown while the feed is reloading.

controls.searchLabel.description: Accessibility label for the feed search input in the filter controls.

controls.searchPlaceholder.description: Placeholder in the feed search input when no TLD is selected.

controls.searchPlaceholderWithTld.description: Placeholder in the feed search input when a TLD filter is active. {tld} is a TLD without the dot, e.g. 'com' — keep untranslated; the literal leading dot is part of the string.

controls.clearSearchAriaLabel.description: Accessibility label for the button that clears the feed search input.

controls.tldLabel.description: Label for the TLD filter selector in the feed controls. Keep 'TLD' (technical term).

controls.allTlds.description: Feed TLD filter option meaning every TLD (no filter). Keep 'TLDs'.

controls.tldPlaceholder.description: Placeholder in the TLD filter search box prompting the user to type a TLD.

controls.noTldMatch.description: Empty-state text in the TLD filter dropdown when the typed TLD matches nothing.

controls.selectedHeading.description: Group heading in the TLD filter dropdown for the currently selected TLD.

controls.customHeading.description: Group heading in the TLD filter dropdown for a custom user-typed TLD.

controls.useCustomTld.description: Option in the TLD filter dropdown to apply a custom TLD. {tld} is the typed TLD without the dot — keep untranslated; the literal leading dot is part of the string.

controls.commonHeading.description: Group heading in the TLD filter dropdown for the list of common TLDs.

controls.clear.description: Button in the feed controls to clear the active TLD filter.

list.errorTitle.description: Feed list error message. {message} is a server-provided error string passed through verbatim.

list.emptyFiltered.description: Empty-state message shown when active feed filters match no listings.

list.empty.description: Empty-state message shown when the feed has no listings at all.

list.loadMore.description: Button at the bottom of the feed list to load more listings.

list.endOfFeed.description: Marker shown at the bottom of the feed when all listings have loaded.

list.backToTopAriaLabel.description: Accessibility label for the feed button that scrolls back to the top.

card.unknownSeller.description: Fallback seller handle on a feed sale card when the seller is unknown. Keep the literal '@unknown' handle untranslated.

card.otherDomains.description: Feed sale card text for additional domains beyond the one shown. ICU plural on {count}; # is the count of other domains.

card.openDomainAriaLabel.description: Accessibility label for the feed sale card link opening a domain. {domain} is the domain name — keep untranslated.

card.openSourceAriaLabel.description: Accessibility label for the feed sale card link opening the original source listing. {source} is the source/marketplace name and {domain} is the domain name — keep both untranslated.

card.noExcerpt.description: Feed sale card placeholder shown when the listing has no excerpt text.

card.justNow.description: Relative timestamp on a feed sale card meaning the listing was posted moments ago.

card.unknownDate.description: Feed sale card fallback shown when the listing date is unknown.

card.logoAlt.description: Alt text for a source/marketplace logo on a feed sale card. {name} is the source name — keep untranslated.

report.trigger.description: Button on a feed sale card that opens the report-listing dialog.

report.reported.description: Button label on a feed sale card after the listing has already been reported.

report.triggerAriaLabel.description: Accessibility label for the report button on a feed sale card. {domain} is the domain name — keep untranslated.

report.dialogTitle.description: Title of the report-listing dialog in the feed.

report.dialogDescription.description: Body text of the report-listing dialog. {domain} is the domain name (rendered emphasized via the <highlight> tag) — keep {domain} and the <highlight></highlight> tag intact.

report.reasonLabel.description: Field label for the reason selector in the report-listing dialog.

report.reasonPlaceholder.description: Placeholder in the reason selector of the report-listing dialog.

report.detailsLabel.description: Field label for the optional details textarea in the report-listing dialog.

report.detailsPlaceholder.description: Placeholder in the optional details textarea of the report-listing dialog.

report.detailsHelp.description: Helper text under the optional details textarea in the report-listing dialog.

report.detailsCounter.description: Character counter under the report-listing details textarea. {count} is the current character count; '/1000' is the literal limit.

report.detailsTooLong.description: Validation error in the report-listing dialog when details exceed the 1000-character limit.

report.cancel.description: Cancel button in the report-listing dialog.

report.submit.description: Submit button in the report-listing dialog.

report.submitting.description: Submit button label shown while the report is being submitted.

report.submitSuccess.description: Success toast after submitting a report. {domain} is the domain name — keep untranslated.

report.submitErrorFallback.description: Generic error toast shown when submitting a report fails.

report.unexpectedResponse.description: Error toast shown when the report submission returns an unexpected server response.

report.reasons.alreadySold.label.description: Report-reason option label: the domain has already been sold.

report.reasons.alreadySold.description.description: Report-reason option description explaining the 'already sold' reason.

report.reasons.inaccuratePrice.label.description: Report-reason option label: the listed price is inaccurate.

report.reasons.inaccuratePrice.descripti.description: Report-reason option description explaining the 'inaccurate price' reason.

report.reasons.notForSale.label.description: Report-reason option label: the listing is not a real domain for sale.

report.reasons.notForSale.description.description: Report-reason option description explaining the 'not for sale' reason.

report.reasons.duplicateListing.label.description: Report-reason option label: this listing is a duplicate.

report.reasons.duplicateListing.descript.description: Report-reason option description explaining the 'duplicate listing' reason.

report.reasons.other.label.description: Report-reason option label: any other issue.

report.reasons.other.description.description: Report-reason option description prompting the user to describe the issue in the details field.

handle.backToFeed.description: Link on a seller's feed page to return to the main feed.

handle.fallbackSeller.description: Fallback seller handle on a seller feed page when unknown. Keep the literal '@unknown' handle untranslated.

handle.refresh.description: Button on a seller feed page to reload the seller's listings.

handle.refreshing.description: Button label shown while a seller's listings are reloading.

handle.invalidPath.description: Error message shown when the seller feed URL path is invalid.

handle.loadErrorFallback.description: Error message shown when loading a seller's listings fails.

handle.emptyListings.description: Empty-state message when a seller has no listings.

handle.endOfListings.description: Marker at the bottom of a seller's listings when all have loaded.

handle.loadMore.description: Button to load more of a seller's listings.

handle.subtitle.invalidPath.description: Seller feed page subtitle shown when the URL path is invalid.

handle.subtitle.noDomains.description: Seller feed page subtitle shown when the seller has listed no domains yet.

handle.subtitle.feedAndNamefi.description: Seller feed page subtitle counting both feed and Namefi-owned domains. ICU plurals on {feedCount} and {namefiCount}; # is each count. Keep 'Namefi' verbatim.

handle.subtitle.feedOnly.description: Seller feed page subtitle counting only feed-listed domains. ICU plural on {feedCount}; # is the count.

users.backToFeed.description: Link on the feed users directory to return to the main feed.

users.title.description: Title of the feed users directory page.

users.loadingSubtitle.description: Subtitle shown while the feed users directory is loading.

users.subtitle.description: Feed users directory subtitle counting matching users. ICU plural on {count}; # is the count.

users.subtitleRefreshed.description: Feed users directory subtitle with refresh time. ICU plural on {count} (# is the count); {refreshedAt} is a pre-formatted timestamp.

users.refresh.description: Button on the feed users directory to reload the user list.

users.exportCsv.description: Button on the feed users directory to export the user list as CSV. Keep 'CSV' (technical term).

users.exportSuccess.description: Success toast after exporting the users list as CSV. Keep 'CSV'.

users.exportErrorTitle.description: Error toast title when exporting the users CSV fails. Keep 'CSV'.

users.exportErrorFallback.description: Error toast body shown when exporting the users CSV fails.

users.searchPlaceholder.description: Placeholder in the feed users directory search input.

users.clearSearchAriaLabel.description: Accessibility label for the button that clears the feed users directory search input.

users.minPostsAriaLabel.description: Accessibility label for the minimum-posts filter in the feed users directory.

users.minPostsOption.description: Minimum-posts filter option in the feed users directory. {count} is the minimum post count; '+' is literal.

users.activeWithinAriaLabel.description: Accessibility label for the active-within (recency) filter in the feed users directory.

users.anyTime.description: Active-within filter option meaning no recency limit, in the feed users directory.

users.activeWithinDays.description: Active-within filter option by number of days in the feed users directory. {count} is the number of days.

users.lastDays.description: Compact active-within filter label in the feed users directory. {count} is the number of days; the trailing 'd' abbreviates days.

users.clear.description: Button to clear filters in the feed users directory.

users.columns.user.description: Column header in the feed users directory table: the user/handle.

users.columns.domains.description: Column header in the feed users directory table: number of domains.

users.columns.cadence.description: Column header in the feed users directory table: posting cadence/frequency.

users.columns.lastPost.description: Column header in the feed users directory table: time of the user's last post.

users.domainsPerPost.description: Cadence cell in the feed users directory: domains per post. {count} is the average; '/ post' is literal.

users.postsPerWeek.description: Cadence cell unit label in the feed users directory: posts per week.

users.namefiOwned.description: Feed users directory cell noting Namefi-owned domains. {count} is the number. Keep 'Namefi' verbatim.

users.today.description: Last-post cell value in the feed users directory meaning the user posted today.

users.daysAgo.description: Last-post cell value in the feed users directory. {count} is the number of days ago; the trailing 'd' abbreviates days.

users.unknownDate.description: Last-post cell fallback in the feed users directory when the date is unknown.

users.emptyThreshold.description: Empty-state message in the feed users directory when no users meet the selected filter threshold.

users.loadingMore.description: Label shown while loading more users in the feed users directory.

users.loadMore.description: Button to load more users in the feed users directory.

users.listings.description: Label/link in the feed users directory pointing to a user's listings.

users.post.description: Label/link in the feed users directory for a user's individual post.
